title: Has banning phones improved performance at Dutch schools?
summary_full: Two years ago the Netherlands banned phones in schools. Now the government wants to go further, pushing to restrict social media for under‑16s.
summary_public: Two years ago the Netherlands banned phones in schools. Now the government wants to go further, pushing to restrict social media for under‑16s.

NL.label: neutral
